3) No ethics in treating vendors. Internal teams just want their work to be done first irrespective of vendor's availability. They demand, command if needed scold and get the things done. And they also ask you to do the same and get things done. They don't have proper management and always run back of sales, numbers, targets, figures.
4) Senior management is just for name sake and to take high salaries but management wise gram panchayat administration will operate much better than this company.
5) You have to be available when ever they call you. They will call you in Teams, if no response then whatsapp, if no response then normal call, if no response then whatsapp message or normal message. Either ways they will try all communications mediums possible to poke you all the time.
